prompt_used: Story: Red Creek Winter (red-creek-winter) | Hook: Each snowfall uncovers one body and one impossible alibi. | Subgenre: small-town slasher mystery | Tone: INTENSE | Location: Mountain logging town under blizzard lockdown | Villain: The White Knife | Villain worldview: Fear is the only honest truth in a town built on denial. | Motifs: snow lines, hunting whistles, frosted glass.
